channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitics news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷⚔️ US and Iran Exchange Fire as Fragile Ceasefire Shows Cracks
item.description: US military carried out retaliatory strikes on Iranian targets after renewed hostilities in the Strait of Hormuz. The UAE reported intercepting drones and missiles as Trump insisted the ceasefire still holds.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇺🇦💥 Russia Intercepts 50+ Drones Over Moscow Ahead of Victory Day Parade
item.description: Russian air defense units intercepted more than 50 drones heading for Moscow over 15 hours as Ukraine continued strikes despite Russia declaring a ceasefire for WWII commemorations.

item.title: 🇮🇱🇱🇧⚔️ Netanyahu Vows No Immunity for Enemies After Beirut Strike
item.description: Israel struck a Hezbollah commander in Beirut, its first strike on the capital since the ceasefire. Netanyahu declared there would be no immunity for militants threatening Israel.

item.title: 🇺🇸🌍📉 Global Views of US Fall Below Russia Under Trump, Survey Finds
item.description: An annual democracy study shows US global perceptions have deteriorated for a second year and now rank worse than Russia, as Trump's policies strain the NATO alliance.

item.title: 🇧🇷🇺🇸🏛️ Lula Visits Trump Seeking to Avert Trade Tariffs
item.description: Brazilian President Lula met with Trump in Washington to discuss trade relations and tariffs. The two leaders skipped a joint press appearance despite signs of thaw in relations.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia ramps up assassination campaign against opponents abroad, Western intelligence says
item.description: Western intelligence officials report Russia has intensified targeted killings abroad since the 2022 Ukraine invasion, going after Russian activists and foreign supporters of Ukraine using recruited proxies. Plots have been disrupted in France, Germany, Lithuania, and Poland.

item.title: 📉 US stocks fall from records as oil prices yo-yo amid Iran tensions
item.description: US stocks dropped from their record highs while oil prices fluctuated sharply as tensions between the US and Iran continued to roil global markets.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea Deploys New Artillery Targeting Seoul, Commissions First Destroyer
item.description: North Korea has deployed new artillery guns capable of targeting Seoul and commissioned its first destroyer, according to state media reports.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Chinese J-35 Stealth Jets Give Pakistan Edge Over India in Fifth-Generation Tech
item.description: Pakistan's acquisition of Chinese J-35 stealth fighter jets is set to provide a significant military advantage over India in fifth-generation aircraft technology, according to military analysts.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Air Defenses Respond to Missile Threat as Iran Conflict Escalates
item.description: The UAE's air defenses are actively engaging with missile and drone threats as regional tensions from the Iran-US conflict continue to escalate.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Third Round of Lebanon-Israel Talks Scheduled for Next Week
item.description: A US official confirmed that the third round of negotiations between Lebanon and Israel will be held next week as diplomatic efforts continue.

item.title: 🇺🇳 US Iran Resolution Faces Likely Veto by China and Russia at UN
item.description: The US urged countries to support its UN resolution demanding Iran halt attacks and mining of the Strait of Hormuz, but diplomats say China and Russia are likely to veto it.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Pussy Riot Demonstrates at Venice Biennale Against Russia's Participation
item.description: Anti-Kremlin activists Pussy Riot staged a demonstration at the Venice Biennale to protest Russia's return to the international art exhibition.

item.title: 🇧🇷 Brazil's Lula Visits Trump in Washington to Avert Trade Tariffs
item.description: Brazilian President Lula visited Washington to discuss trade relations with Trump amid concerns over potential new US tariffs on Brazilian products.

item.title: 🇷🇸 Serbia's President Dismisses Bid by Local Company to Buy NIS Oil Firm
item.description: Serbia's president dismissed a bid by a local company to purchase the NIS oil firm, amid ongoing tensions in the energy sector.

item.title: 🛢️ US Oil Prices Jump on Renewed Iran Hostilities
item.description: Oil prices rose about 1% after renewed fighting between the US and Iran threatened a shaky ceasefire and dashed hopes for reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Carries Out Retaliatory Strikes Against Iran
item.description: The US military carried out retaliatory strikes on Iran on Thursday, targeting sites responsible for attacking US forces in what it called unprovoked hostilities by Tehran.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Trump Sees Swift End to War as Iran Reviews US Peace Proposal
item.description: President Trump expressed optimism about a swift end to the Iran conflict as Tehran reviews a US peace proposal amid ongoing hostilities.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Continues to Violate Kyiv-Proposed Ceasefire, Zelenskiy Says
item.description: President Zelenskiy said Russia continued to flout a Kyiv-proposed ceasefire, adding that Ukraine would continue its long-range strikes if Russia carried on with assaults.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Ukraine's Top Negotiator Arrives in Miami for Talks with US Envoys
item.description: Ukraine's top negotiator Rustem Umerov arrived in Miami for meetings with US representatives as peace talks on ending Russia's war have stalled in recent months.

item.title: 💵 Dollar Firms as US-Iran Hostilities Flare, Yen Steadied by Intervention Risk
item.description: The dollar firmed against major currencies as renewed US-Iran hostilities boosted safe-haven demand, while the yen was steadied by intervention risk.

item.title: 🇭🇰 UK Court Convicts Two Men Linked to Hong Kong Trade Office in Spying Case
item.description: A UK court convicted two men linked to the Hong Kong trade office in a spying case, marking a significant development in intelligence-related prosecutions.

item.title: 🇦🇲 Armenia 'Not an Ally of Russia' on Ukraine Issue, PM Says as Kremlin Fumes Over Zelensky Visit
item.description: Armenian PM stated Armenia is not an ally of Russia on the Ukraine issue during Zelensky's visit, drawing criticism from the Kremlin.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Carried Out 13 Attacks on Israeli Forces in Southern Lebanon
item.description: Hezbollah announced it carried out 13 attacks on Israeli forces and sites in southern Lebanon amid ongoing border tensions.
